title: fumaria × condensata
intro: Fumaria × condensata, also known as Fumaria, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Fumaria officinalis and Fumaria vaillantii plants. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Fumaria × condensata include treating conditions such as gout, arthritis, and other inflammatory diseases, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Fumaria × condensata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves, stems, and roots.
